content: Competitor auto-play behavior (from issue trackers, not direct UI testing — LOW confidence): AntennaPod has user-controlled auto-play settings (issue #7259 'playback starts immediately after connecting to Android Auto, even though I told it not to' confirms a toggle exists). Resume-on-open is the default for audiobook/podcast apps — issue #7643 'Occasionally unable to resume podcasts' confirms this is expected behavior with reliability bugs even in mature apps. BookPlayer GitHub issue search 404'd (repo moved). Smart Audiobook Player and Libby not directly researched (closed-source). User's reference set (LibriVox/YouTube/knigavuhe/4read) all auto-play on open per PROJECT.md — this is the table-stakes bar.
